race.comment: IN YOUR WORDS (9) is mixing her form and hasn't won for a long time but boasts peaks that measure up. Caught the eye two back at Naracoorte, before a midfield finish seven days ago. Backs up quickly and gets in light with the claim. Can play a major role this time. LICHESTER (5) was better last start at Great Western when just missing the frame in a blanket finish. Drops back in trip off 32 days and draws well. QUEENOFTHEAIR (10) is another that hasn't won for a long time but shows glimpses of life in patches. Strikes a thing contest and is drawn to get all the favours. Keeping in mind. ZE BIRDS'N'ZEBEES (8) hasn't threatened in his last two but his earlier form measures up. Is another that can play a role.
